---
title: "Overview RAG — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Subset: NotebookLM (workspace com sources/notes/outputs cross-account)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_unified_views,
)

SUBSET_TITLE     = "RAG (NotebookLM)"
SOURCES_FILTER   = ["notebooklm"]
UNIFIED_DIR      = _project_root / "data" / "unified"
MUTED            = "#D1D5DB"

# Cor por conta (NotebookLM tem 3: account-1 en, account-2 pt-BR, account-3 legacy)
SOURCE_COLORS = {
    "notebooklm": "#F4B400",
}

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_unified_views(con, UNIFIED_DIR, sources_filter=SOURCES_FILTER)
```

{{< include _template_overview.qmd >}}
